avatar.description:
Like! Follow! Stream! Views! Party till the world ends!
Sparxie and Sparkle, the Mask and the Fool are fundamentally the same.
Whoever is seen, whoever is liked, is the correct answer!

Mysterious, bold, radical... her quest for change is stunning.
With the "eye" of The Hunt, she sees all fates. Though she knows fate is immutable, the Seer Strategist still walks into danger alone.
With the odds stacked against her, how can she possibly change her destiny?

avatar.name: Ashveil
avatar.description:
He takes cases on a whim, cracks them with hard-core logic, and solves the strangest crimes on sheer instinct.
With a monkey for an assistant and his heart set on retirement, the detective sleeps in a refrigerator, waiting for the bait to catch its willing prey.
Under the light of the Phantasmoon, the vile beast howls. How will he draw the net on this hunt?

skills.name: Talons: Inculcate Decorum
skills.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Ashveil's ATK to one designated enemy.

skills.name: Flog: Smite Evil
skills.description:
Makes one designated enemy become the "Bait," dealing it Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Ashveil's ATK. If the target is already the "Bait," additionally deals it Lightning DMG equal to ****3[i]%**** of Ashveil's ATK, and recovers **5[i]** Skill Point(s). When the "Bait" exists on the field, all enemies' DEF gets reduced by ****4[i]%****.
When there is no "Bait" on the field, Ashveil immediately makes the enemy target with the lowest HP on the field become the "Bait." The "Bait" state only takes effect on the most recently applied target.

skills.name: Banquet: Insatiable Appetite
skills.description:
Makes one designated enemy become the "Bait," dealing it Lightning DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Ashveil's ATK. Then, immediately launches 1 instance of enhanced Talent's **Follow-Up ATK** against the "Bait." And Ashveil gains **2[i]** Charge.
This enhanced Talent's **Follow-Up ATK** does not consume Charge. Whenever "Gluttony" reaches **3[i]** stack(s) or more, consumes **3[i]** stack(s) of "Gluttony" to additionally deal 1 instance of Lightning DMG equal to ****4[i]%**** of Ashveil's ATK. And when this instance of **Follow-Up ATK** deals a killing blow to the target, it will continue to deal DMG to a new "Bait." This triggers until "Gluttony" becomes lower than **3[i]** stack(s). If all enemy targets currently on the field have been dealt killing blows, the enhanced Talent's **Follow-Up ATK** will immediately end.

skills.name: Rancor: Enmity Reprisal
skills.description: Ashveil has an initial Charge of **1[i]** and can hold up to a max of **2[i]**. After the "Bait" gets attacked by other ally targets, Ashveil regenerates a fixed amount of **7[i]** Energy, then consumes **3[i]** Charge to launch **Follow-Up ATK** against the "Bait," dealing Lightning DMG equal to ****4[i]%**** of Ashveil's ATK. Afterwards, gains **5[i]** stack(s) of "Gluttony," which can stack up to **6[i]**.

avatar.name: Evanescia
avatar.description:
One season the Phantasmoon waxes full, one season the mortal world shifts anew: The mysterious girl reappears in Planarcadia!
Fallen petals scatter with ease, and her stay was but a fleeting instant. Everything about this new era enthralls her, and she will not allow anyone to bring it to ruin...
A single ruler blade judges right from wrong, but who can say how much good or evil lies within oneself?

tree.name: Youth: Halcyon Evermore
tree.description:
Evanescia gains Elation equal to **5[i]%** of CRIT DMG. When Evanescia gains Energy, she will simultaneously gain an equal amount of "**Certified Banger**." When Evanescia gains "**Certified Banger**," she will simultaneously gain an equal amount of Energy. The amount of "**Certified Banger**" taken into calculation via this method cannot exceed **100** points in a single instance.
After accumulating **3[i]** Energy, she consumes this accumulation of **3[i]**, and "Master Fox" launches **Follow-Up ATK**, dealing Physical DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies, and regenerates **4[i]** Energy for Evanescia. Each instance of Energy regeneration grants up to an accumulation of **3[i]**. While Evanescia holds "**Certified Banger**":
Using Skill can deal ****7[f1]%**** Physical **Elation DMG** to the attacked enemy targets.
Using Ultimate can deal ****6[i]%**** Physical **Elation DMG** to all enemies and also deals ****8[i]%**** Physical **Elation DMG** to the enemy targets that have been randomly dealt DMG by Ultimate. When Ultimate deals **Elation DMG**, the amount of "**Certified Banger**" taken into account is at least equal to Max Energy.
Master Fox's **Follow-Up ATK** deals ****2[i]%**** Physical **Elation DMG** to all enemies.

tree.name: Petalfall: Floral Reminiscence
tree.description: Immediately attacks all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, deals Physical DMG equal to **1[i]%** of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies and gains **2[i]** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**."

tree.name: Watch All Revels
tree.description: Increases Evanescia's CRIT Rate by **30%**. When there are (≥3)/2/1 enemy target(s) on the field, the Ultimate's bounce count increases by **1**/**2**/**4**. When a teammate with an Elation Skill Participant ID lower than Evanescia's gains "**Certified Banger**," Evanescia converts **50%** of it into her own "**Certified Banger**."

tree.name: Weigh All Truths
tree.description: When "Master Fox" uses an attack, it additionally inflicts Vulnerability on the target, increasing the DMG they take by **12%** for **3** turn(s).

tree.name: Best All Blooms
tree.description: When a teammate's "**Certified Banger**" ends, Evanescia converts **50%** of it into her own "**Certified Banger**."

tree.name: Scarlet: Elation or Execution
tree.description: Deals ****2[i]%**** Physical **Elation DMG** to all enemies and additionally gains **1[i]** point(s) of "**Certified Banger**".

ranks.name: Home: A Prayer in Dance
ranks.description: Increases All-Type RES PEN by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. After "Master Fox" uses an attack, additionally triggers 1 instance of Elation Skill. Elation Skill additionally grants this unit <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "<u>Certified Banger</u>" point(s).

ranks.name: Voyage: A Wish for Everbloom
ranks.description: CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When triggering the Certified Banger gain effect from the Trace "Watch All Revels"/"Best All Blooms", additionally gains "<u>Certified Banger</u>" equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of the "<u>Certified Banger</u>" gained this time.

ranks.name: Blade: A Feast on Evils
ranks.description: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

ranks.name: Meadow: A Ruin by Vice
ranks.description: Evanescia's DMG dealt ignores <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the enemy targets' DEF.

ranks.name: Arcadia: A Glimpse of Fates
ranks.description: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

ranks.name: Maiden: A Step into Dreams
ranks.description: The duration of Evanescia's "<u>Certified Banger</u>" increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). The <u>Elation DMG</u> dealt by Evanescia <u>merrymakes</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. For every <unbreak>100</unbreak> points of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" held, it additionally <u>merrymakes</u> by <unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak>. Up to <unbreak>1000</unbreak> points of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" can be taken into account. After using Ultimate for the first time upon entering combat, regenerates a fixed amount of <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy for Evanescia. This effect can trigger 1 time for every <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> more instances of Ultimate used.

avatar.name: Silver Wolf LV.<unbreak>999</unbreak>
avatar.description:
A new season of Elation begins, featuring the limited-time return of the invincible player "Silver Wolf LV.**999**"!
She's conquered the universe, unlocked every cosmic achievement... What's left to play?
**"Reach the peak of 'Elation'? Boring... Since I've got the cartridge now, I make the rules~"**

skills.name: One Punch!
skills.description: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Silver Wolf LV.**999**'s ATK to one designated enemy.

skills.name: Trigger Happy
skills.description: Gains **2[i]** **Punchline** point(s) and deals Imaginary DMG equal to ****1[i]%**** of Silver Wolf LV.**999**'s ATK to all enemies.

skills.name: God Mode: ON!
skills.description:
Enters the "Godmode Player" state, and **advances action** by **100%**.
Deploys a Zone while in the "Godmode Player" state. While Silver Wolf LV.**999** holds "**Certified Banger**," for every 1 Skill Point consumed by an ally target within the Zone, there is a chance to trigger 1 instance of Silver Wolf LV.**999**'s "**Top Loot Box**": Deals ****3[i]%**** Imaginary **Elation DMG** that is distributed evenly among all enemies, and randomly triggers 1 of the following effects:
"Big Flipping Sword": Additionally deals **True DMG** equal to **5[i]%** of the total DMG dealt this time to the enemy target with the highest HP.
"Kaboom Eggsplosion": Recovers **7[i]** Skill Point(s).
"Funky Munch Bean": Gains **6[i]** **Punchline** point(s).
The initial **fixed chance** to trigger the effect is **100%**. After a successfully trigger, the **fixed chance** for the next trigger is reduced to **4[i]%** of the current chance. If the target is defeated before it triggers, it will instead trigger on a newly entering enemy target.

skills.name: I Carry, We Win
skills.description:
After "Hidden MMR" reaches **1[i]**, can activate Ultimate. And after reaching its maximum limit, it can overflow by an additional **2[i]** point(s).
When gaining **Punchline**, Silver Wolf LV.**999** gains an equal amount of "Hidden MMR." Each point of "Hidden MMR" increases CRIT Rate by ****4[f2]%****. Once CRIT Rate reaches **100%**, each additional point of "Hidden MMR" instead increases CRIT DMG by ****6[f2]%****.
While in the "Godmode Player" state, Silver Wolf LV.**999** becomes immune to **Crowd Control debuffs**, cannot use Ultimate, and gains Enhanced Basic ATK and Enhanced Elation Skill. After fully using Enhanced Basic ATK **5[i]** time(s), she exits the "Godmode Player" state. When exiting the "Godmode Player" state, clears "Hidden MMR".
While holding "**Certified Banger**," using Basic ATK or Skill deals ****3[i]%**** Imaginary **Elation DMG** to the attacked enemy targets. And the Enhanced Basic ATK's ability DMG changes to **Elation DMG** at the same multiplier.

skills.name: Attack
skills.description: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

skills.name: This? Absolute Meta!
skills.description:
Summons "Funky Munch Bean." Use again to dismiss. Using Technique does not consume Technique Points. When Technique Points reach 0, the summon is dismissed and Technique cannot be used.
"Funky Munch Bean" causes Normal Enemies within a certain range to enter a Terrified state. It will also automatically search for and attack Normal Enemies, consuming 1 Technique Point to instantly defeat them without entering combat.
While "Funky Munch Bean" is present, after entering combat, 1 instance of "**Top Loot Box**" from "Funky Munch Bean" is triggered at the start of each wave. A fixed amount of **1[i]** "**Certified Banger**" is taken into account for the **Elation DMG** dealt in this instance.

skills.name: Bonus Stage: αWolf Instant
skills.description:
Deals Imaginary DMG equal to a total of ****1[i]%**** of Silver Wolf LV.**999**'s ATK, split evenly into **3[i]** hits that bounce onto random enemies. After every set number of bounces, the bouncing pauses and the **Top Loot Box** triggers 1 time. Can trigger up to **5[i]** time(s) in total.
When dealing fatal damage to all enemies on the field, this ability ends. After attackable enemy targets appear, gains 1 **extra turn** and uses this ability again based on the remaining number of bounces and **Top Loot Box** triggers. The first time this effect triggers in each turn, extends the duration of all **buffs** on this unit by 1 turn.
After all of the above DMG is dealt, launches a Final Hit that deals Imaginary DMG equal to ****4[i]%**** of Silver Wolf LV.**999**'s ATK, split evenly among all enemies.
Enhanced Basic ATK cannot recover Skill Points. For every **6[i]** points of "Hidden MMR" held, increases DMG dealt during Enhanced Basic ATK by **8[i]%** of the original DMG, stacking up to **7[i]** time(s).

skills.name: Pro-Gamer Move
skills.description: Gains **1[i]** "Hidden MMR" point(s).

skills.name: Honkai-DMG Demo
skills.description: Deals **2[i]** instances of DMG, with each instance dealing ****1[i]%**** Imaginary **Elation DMG** to one random enemy. Then, resets the **fixed chance** to trigger "**Top Loot Box**" to its initial value.

tree.description: If the number of **Punchline** points taken into account when using Elation Skill is **20** or more, additionally gains **20** "Hidden MMR" points (And if it's **40** or more, then gains **20** more points on top of that).

relics.name: Magical Girl's Shining Medal
relics.description: The magical girl's candy-colored bow hairpin, shining like a glittering medal.
story: Magical Girl's Shining Medal

Before making the deal, the merchant is extra cautious, with vigilant bodyguards scanning the crowd for anything suspicious.
To work undercover in this decadent district, all magical girls must remain on high alert.

"This is no challenge for us Magical Girl Troupe."
Without their idol outfits, and with their perfectly disheveled hair, the magical girls instantly blend in with the crowd, infiltrating the city according to plan.
Under the dim lights, their candy-colored hairpins serve as their secret insignias to identify each other.
"Café team in position." "Crossroads team in position." "Target spotted."
...
"We are the messengers who protect all that is beautiful!"

"It's them! Those super-strong pretty girls!" wails one of the fleeing suspects, his face black and blue. "Now Big Bro's been caught too. They're gonna get a medal for this!"

Over time, hairpins gradually took on the true meaning of "medals."
Some magical girls would add a new bead to it after completing a mission, and they came to love this fashionable way of displaying their glory even more.

relics.name: Magical Girl's Protective Gloves
relics.description: Multi-functional magical girl gloves, combining entertainment and combat capabilities. Pure white hands, protecting everyone's wishes.
story: Magical Girl's Protective Gloves

Magical girls embody the beautiful wishes of Planarcadia, yet they walk closest to the grotesque.
Bizarre and dangerous imagenae, nauseating murder scenes, violent and unstable criminals... this is the daily reality they face.

After a day of grueling work, their pristine white gloves are smudged with dirt, dust, and blood, yet they must keep smiling.
"Come on, you're a magical girl, how can you talk to me with such a gloomy face?"
"A real-life magical girl, like in the comics! Are you working? Show me some magic!"
"What's the point? You're just part of the scenery."
...

Melancholy and despair gnaw away at the pure hearts of magical girls. According to a widespread urban legend, they'll suddenly vanish from their teams without a trace, becoming devils who hunt down their former companions.
But beyond these unverified ghost stories, there are indeed many heartbreaking stories about magical girls.

"A magical girl who left due to injury sobbed her heart out while downing drink after drink over her gloves!" the drunken Fool joked, "Because her digital pet died again!"
That digital pet was named "Dodo," left behind by her fallen team leader.
On her wrist rested a tiny grave, in honor of that magical girl.

relics.name: Magical Girl's Everdance Battle Skirt
relics.description: A customized multipurpose combat suit that doubles as an idol's performance miniskirt. Comfortable, lightweight, and stain-resistant.
story: Magical Girl's Everdance Battle Skirt

The magical energy of a magical girl comes from the Wishpower of the citizens. To maintain public support, magical girls often double as idols performing on stage.
But Planarcadia is never short of novel entertainment. Thus, even as a beloved classic icon for years, magical girls are also constantly innovating to stay in the spotlight.

They join livestreaming teams, collaborate with trendy works, and release more accessible songs... yet the audience clamors for more. More sorrow, more joy, more devotion, and anything else that will keep boredom at bay.

It all began with an unexpected incident: During a live show, several magical girls protected the audience from an evil imagenae, gaining an unexpectedly positive reception.
This gradually evolved into a staged spectacle: A group of magical girls, acting as villains, would interrupt the performance, only to be dramatically defeated by another group of them.
"They'll protect us, with their magical rocket launchers and magical heart lasers!" The audience's eyes sparkled with exhilaration and anticipation.

The laughter must not cease, and the joy must not falter. The girls' skirts whirl in a frenzy until the very last ounce of their strength is spent.
When the curtain falls, the crowd departs, delighted, and greedily awaiting the next spectacle of Elation.

relics.name: Magical Girl's Contract Boots
relics.description: First-class wear-resistant boots. True promises are built not on words, but on the steps you take to fulfill them.
story: Magical Girl's Contract Boots

The Magical Girl Troupe promised the citizens of Planarcadia: Any crime will be dealt with in fifteen minutes.
This itself was no difficult task for magical girls, but sometimes, such promises became an excuse for others to toy with them for amusement.

"You really showed up! How about a photo, gorgeous messengers?"

Running without purpose drains one's strength, and protection without respect frays promises.
The boots, originally designed to be light for pursuing enemies, grew heavy with their dejection.

"To ensure we never miss a genuine cry for help, and to ensure we're always there when every second counts, we will never stop running," declared the leader of the Troupe. "But make no mistake: I will not let those who made a mockery of our promise get away with it."

Those who defiled the contract are as guilty as the traitors. Thus, the girls cast a spell upon their boots.
The next morning, a group of runners appeared in the streets of Planarcadia. Their faces were filled with terror, yet their legs carried them tirelessly onward, pausing only for those in need.

That is the magic called "The Promise," and it is also the first vow of all magical girls.

relics.name: Diviner's Extrapolation Jade Abacus
relics.description: The external jade abacus worn by Jingtian. Knowing well that human strength could never fathom fate, he used it to ceaselessly divine the future.
story: Diviner's Extrapolation Jade Abacus

For years, the jade abacus sat fixed upon his head as if it were a natural organ.
Threads of light meandered into his gray hair, merging with his very consciousness.
At a speed far beyond mortal limits, he interpreted vast streams of data, translating them into lucid hexagrams. Even in sleep, portents would flow into his mind as a parade of strange dreams.

Admiring his reputation as "The Divine Seer," students meeting him for the first time would often ask curiously:
"Master Jingtian, if the jade abacus is so miraculous, then surely, in time, it could lay bare all of the world's secrets?"
In response, he would often pose some puzzling questions:
"That depends on... what do you see it as?"
Many would flatter him to his face, only to be met with a silent smile and a gentle shake of his head. Yet among them, one particularly spirited young girl spoke with blunt honesty:
"It looks like... a shackle."

Instead of getting angry, he burst into hearty laughter.
For a distinguished diviner, the greatest peril is being trapped within the confines of his own extrapolation.
"If one believes solely in the jade abacus," he muttered, "how can one comprehend the will of fate?"
Yet years later, he chose a different path, the only one that destiny had laid before him.

relics.name: Diviner's Ingenium Prosthetic Hand
relics.description: After losing an arm on the battlefield of Thalassa, Jingtian crafted himself a prosthetic arm, which was as cold and precise as his divinations.
story: Diviner's Ingenium Prosthetic Hand

At the Battle of Thalassa, the Yaoqing forces faced off against the borisin.
The newly formed "Deca-Light Reflection Barrier" produced a baffling prediction: instead of deploying the millions-strong and battle-hardened Yaoqing fleet, seek help from the distant Ebonpearl Fleet of the Xianzhou Fanghu.

This conclusion defied conventional military wisdom, and the generals, as expected, adhered to the former course.
The Master Diviner of the Yuque remained in the rear, delving into mystical calculations and presenting the results to the Arbiter-Generals as a foundation for their verdicts, as was customary.
But when the divination results clashed with rational expectations, he resolved to verify them personally.

Disguised as a traveling merchant, he infiltrated the water dwellers' camp.
When the borisin surrounded the water dwellers, he stepped in to save them, ultimately winning their trust at the cost of an arm. From them, he learned a secret that no data bank had ever recorded:
Stirred by the moon, the "Devil's Tide" would engulf the battlefield in a month. The Yaoqing army, deficient in naval combat, would surely fail to sustain their fight, leaving only the Fanghu's Ebonpearl Fleet, adept in water, with any hope of victory.

When he returned, a prosthetic hand had appeared beneath his sleeve.
Diviners of the Yuque had always cherished their hands, even applying ancestral protective hand balm after their divinations.
But having lost an arm, he could no longer perform his delicate calculations as before, and when rotating the astral charts, it would always emit a hollow sound.

That hand was always cold, just like his increasingly precise divination results.
He gradually saw the full picture of the path ahead, far more vast than he had imagined...
An inescapable destiny, with absolutely no possibility of change.

relics.name: Diviner's Astral Robe
relics.description: The standard-issue ritual robe of the Yuque Divination Commission is typically reserved for formal occasions. Due to its rare use, it still looks as good as new.
story: Diviner's Astral Robe

With the demonic star Ketu Mirage looming overhead, the Xianzhou Fanghu was in imminent danger.
He knew the ominous prophecy from many years ago would eventually come true, but he never imagined it would manifest in this way.
He was pleased that his student had grown strong enough to protect the Xianzhou, even if it meant he had to use the Yuque's ultimate weapon, Cloudpeer Telescope, to send a distress signal to the Reignbow Arbiter.

That day, he wore a relatively new ritual robe over his pilot's outfit.
"Sorry, I'll leave it to you."
He entrusted his other outstanding disciple with extrapolating the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier, ensuring the Reignbow's Lux Arrow would land on schedule.
"A diviner needs no farewell, since we've already said goodbye countless times in the future we foresee."
After bowing to his colleague, he boarded the Navis Astrigera, heading for the Fanghu.

Cloudpeer Telescope sent a signal to where Reignbow last left its traces.
In the deathly still air, he raised his eyeline, just as he had countless times before, to gaze at the stars above.
A point of light appeared in the sky, his ritual robe rustling in the gentle breeze. He squinted carefully to make it out, then smiled with contentment.
"I... can see it."

As the Lux Arrow roared through the sky like a blazing sun crashing into the earth, demonic stars, abominations, warriors, diviners... all turned to dust.

relics.name: Diviner's Cloud-Soaring Boots
relics.description: Cloud boots crafted by Jingtian allowed him to fly onto battlefields and gather information. They are now displayed in the Yuque's Divination Commission, serving as a testament to future generations.
story: Diviner's Cloud-Soaring Boots

Relics of past Master Diviners are all preserved by the Yuque's Divination Commission.
Among such exquisite divination tools as the Ruyi scepter, celestial instrument, hexagram board... a pair of worn boots stands out conspicuously.

Whenever new blood joins the Divination Commission, their first stop is to come here and pay their respects.
Ever since taking office, the General known as Madam Yao has personally presided over such ceremonies.

Most of Jingtian's relics were destroyed on the battlefield, and not even his remains were left behind.
In life, he crafted these cloud boots to verify his divinations personally, allowing him to move freely between battlefields and gather information swiftly.
However, the General discovered for the first time that these cloud boots, which should never touch the ground, had become covered in fine cracks and wear marks from prolonged use.

"Even if fate is predetermined, a diviner has the duty to understand why it is so."

Her master's voice echoed in her ears once again.
Now, the cloud boots float and spin aimlessly in the air, like a child who has lost their father, lost and bewildered.
Do they yearn to journey even further? Do they long to continue treading across the sea of stars?

The diviners gazed at it, watching as it flew further and further away, becoming a tiny speck of light in their vision, finally dissolving into that vast expanse of darkness and starlight.
Just like the handwritten words engraved beside the relic...

"The path to the universe begins with a single step."

relics.name: Punklorde's Rainbow City
relics.description: Encapsulated within the Planar Sphere is Punklorde's Rainbow City. Day and night blur into one, the virtual and real have no boundaries, and life exists as fleeting bytes of data.
story: Punklorde's Rainbow City

Thanks to technologies from the Genius Society, Punklorde's monopolistic capital built an information industry that far surpasses the interstellar average.
The Internet of Everything, Consciousness Uploading, Virtual Life... Roam the Overworld of Punklorde, and you'll witness a neon paradise of the mortal world: Roaring vehicles tearing down the lanes, converging streams of light weaving through the air, and bustling entertainment centers gorging on extravagant desires and insatiable greed.

However, if you look down from above, Punklorde is nothing but a desolate, run-down sprawl.
Mountains of electronic scrap and compacted trash litter the landscape. Middlemen, black market dealers, gang members... people prowl the mean streets like wild beasts.
There's no shortage of epic legends here, or absurd tales. So much so that hackers' legend claim the Aeon of Elation was once drawn to this place, personally adding THEIR own twisted flavor of fun to Punklorde's rebellion.

Those seeking to reach the pinnacle of Punklorde found their inspiration and compressed their lives into data within Aether Cartridges. With the birth of hackers, the game known as "Punklorde" began.
If you put on the goggles of a hacker and look at this world anew, you'll see drab curtain walls layered with graffiti, every crack potentially concealing folded space, and cursors that suddenly appear in dark alleys turn out to be directions or traps left by those who came before.
In this world of information built from 0 and 1, hackers believe that life is a game, where they challenge the authority, mock the false, create things that exist only in imagination, and tirelessly explore their limits, until the day they "beat the game."

The Interastral Peace Corporation once tried to acquire Punklorde, but an unprecedented attack on the Interastral Network forced the IPC to abandon the plan. In the years that followed, no fewer than ten cosmic powers attempted to swallow up Punklorde, but all of them returned empty-handed.

To this day, Punklorde remains a free zone in the cosmos.
Even in spaces so cramped people can barely move, countless souls still yearn to break free from their shackles. They wander through the world of information, hoping to travel toward the heights of Rainbow City and the universe beyond the stars.

relics.name: Punklorde's Data Deluge
relics.description: In the flowing currents of the network, hackers' cartridges connect with one another. What surges through isn't just data. It's the very lives of the hackers themselves.
story: Punklorde's Data Deluge

Just as Masks define the Masked Fools, Aether Cartridges are what make hackers, hackers.
Massive amounts of virtual currency, entertainment disguised as ordinary files, programs loaded with classified intel, a single command capable of bringing down the entire global network... By plugging in Aether Cartridges, hackers risk being swallowed by the torrents as they navigate through data channels.

In the game of Punklorde, a hacker's cartridge level determines how far they can go. For most hackers, their journey ends at the limits of their own talent.
For those rare few known as "legends," their names will remain forever on the Hacker Guild's leaderboard...

"Zero" triggered the first data meltdown, "Sage" pioneered aether editing technology, "Stoneblade" was remembered for his heroic defiance of the Oasis Zone...

But if you scroll from bottom to top, the name at the very top is an indelible piece of graffiti: Silver Wolf pulling a funny face.
No one knows why an orphan from Mount Scrap skyrocketed to fame overnight, or why she "gifted" her graffiti to the Hacker Guild before vanishing without a trace one day.
Coming and going freely through the "Dark Zone" created by Mythus, engaging in cyber warfare with the genius of Planet Screwllum... Rumors both true and false still circulate. Legend has it she touched the very peak of Elation, yet for some reason never uses that power.

Yet even legends must take their final bow.
At the end of the game, hackers eject their cartridges, wipe their data clean, and embrace the GAME OVER screen.
Back in the day, Punklorde hackers liked to call that final moment Lv. <unbreak>99</unbreak>. But how much would it be now?

relics.name: Astropolis Media Headquarters
relics.description: Encased within the Planar Sphere lies Astropolis: the lofty headquarters of the Interastral Peace Entertainment. This media capital has churned out countless superstars, broadcasting entertainment products across the cosmos with industrial-grade precision.
story: Astropolis Media Headquarters

Wherever credits flow, the IPC's media empire reaches.
Through Interastral Peace Entertainment's relentless innovation, human needs can now be quantified as emotional value per second, and a terminal device connected to the Interastral Peace Network. Trace the signal to its source, and you'll find Astropolis on Epsilon: the very heart of this universal media web.

This towering structure houses the offices of every department within the Interastral Peace Entertainment, jutting up from the surface like a needle pointing toward the sky. Armies of employees work around the clock, churning out movies, radio dramas, and variety shows. The user base they serve is so massive that every single project requires endless rounds of discussion and an industrialized workflow fine-tuned down to every last emotional beat.

The media moguls wanted to keep their department sizes right at the sweet spot on the profit margin curve, breaking down creativity into metrics they could measure and evaluate. One employee let slip that in the narrative database, you'd find tragedy plot points that could make even a Mourning Actor weep, and comedic formulas that'd have a Masked Fool doubled over with laughter. All of it is fed into an algorithm that's adjusted in real-time based on every micro-expression from the audience, ensuring maximum viewership ratings.

There's no denying it. Under the IPC's powerful operations, many cosmic superstars have risen to fame from this very place.
It's a dream factory for stardom, drawing wave after wave of young people chasing their dreams, giving their youth to their aspirations.
The tower's lights never go out. It's a clock hand forever pointing to midnight. Just as the first line of the Astropolis Employee Handbook reads: Humanity's hunger for entertainment knows no boundaries.

relics.name: Astropolis Employee Credentials
relics.description: Employee credentials from Astropolis, marked with rank and personnel information. Perhaps of everything above and beneath the sky, one of the very few things they share.
story: Astropolis Employee Credentials

Gardens, beaches, shopping malls, sporting events... The IPC provides its employees with comfortable living spaces, using them as a showcase for humanity's ideal lifestyle. A model template for the "corporate dream."

After clocking out, head to the beach, go car racing, play volleyball, get on yachts, or attend concerts... There is bound to be a hobby for you to kill time and talk about.
Shopping is the best way to decompress from work. Luxury goods showcase the buyer's social standing, cheap entertainment is a shortcut to happiness. And don't forget: there's that sweet employee discount.
Given the chance, staff won't miss the opportunity to hawk their wares to the omnipresent cameras. A truly outstanding employee has already woven product promotion seamlessly into their life.

High above in the skyscraper where it pierces through the clouds, the tycoons dwell in floating structures, pondering the IPC's future.
Under the direction of Arita, head of the "Traditional Project Department," Astropolis has become neutral ground for the IPC's many departments. Divisions that normally clash gather here regularly to mend fences and smooth over their differences with civility.
It's a place where change takes root. Even the most trivial of decisions made up there can raise tidal waves down below.

Every so often, a lavish rain of bills cascades down from the rooftop above, landing on the heads of lucky employees. It's one of the rare chances to brush shoulders with the higher-ups.
You'll see it all flash through the eyes of ordinary workers: mania, excitement, resentment, boredom... The desire burning in their hearts, ignited like flames. That's the fuel that keeps Astropolis shining bright forever.

relicSets.name: Ever-Glorious Magical Girl
relicSets.four: The Elation DMG dealt by the wearer and their memosprites ignores **10%** of targets' DEF. For every **5** accumulated Punchline allies gain, the Elation DMG dealt additionally ignores **1%** of targets' DEF, stacking up to **10** time(s).
relicSets.fourpc: The Elation DMG dealt by the wearer and their memosprites ignores **1[i]%** of targets' DEF. For every **2[i]** accumulated Punchline allies gain, the Elation DMG dealt additionally ignores **3[i]%** of targets' DEF, stacking up to **4[i]** time(s).

relicSets.name: Diviner of Distant Reach
relicSets.four: Before entering combat, if the wearer's SPD is greater than or equal to **120**/**160**, increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by **10%**/**18%**. When the wearer uses Elation Skill for the first time in each battle, increases all allies' Elation by **10%**. This effect cannot stack.
relicSets.fourpc: Before entering combat, if the wearer's SPD is greater than or equal to **1[i]**/**2[i]**, increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by **3[i]%**/**4[i]%**. When the wearer uses Elation Skill for the first time in each battle, increases all allies' Elation by **5[i]%**. This effect cannot stack.

relicSets.name: Punklorde Stage Zero
relicSets.two: Increases the wearer's Elation by **8%**. When Elation reaches **40%**/**80%** for the first time in combat, increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by **20%**/**32%**.
relicSets.twopc: Increases the wearer's Elation by **1[i]%**. When Elation reaches **2[i]%**/**3[i]%** for the first time in combat, increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by **4[i]%**/**5[i]%**.

relicSets.name: City of Converging Stars
relicSets.two: When the wearer uses Follow-Up ATK, increases ATK by **24%** for **2** turn(s). When an enemy target gets defeated, increases CRIT DMG for all allies by **12%** in the current battle. This effect cannot stack.
relicSets.twopc: When the wearer uses Follow-Up ATK, increases ATK by **1[i]%** for **2[i]** turn(s). When an enemy target gets defeated, increases CRIT DMG for all allies by **3[i]%** in the current battle. This effect cannot stack.
